name: McCormick & Company, Incorporated
description: McCormick & Company, Incorporated is a global leader in flavor, manufacturing, marketing, and distributing spices, seasoning mixes, condiments, and other flavorful products to the entire food industry. Operating across 150 countries and territories, the company serves both retail outlets and food service businesses with a diverse portfolio of iconic brands. Headquartered in Hunt Valley, Maryland, McCormick is dedicated to creating global flavor experiences while maintaining a strong commitment to sustainability, ethical supply chains, and purpose-led performance, ensuring that they continue to shape the future of flavor for consumers and professional chefs worldwide.
